text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: blockSize 太小 (如 32)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每 Block 只有 1 个 Warp

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: SM 需要容纳更多 Block 才能达到好的 Occupancy

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Block 调度开销增加 (更多 Block 要分配)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每 Block 的 Shared Memory 利用率低

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: └ 但: Block 间的并行度高，尾部效应可能更小

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: blockSize 适中 (128-256) ← 最常用

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 4-8 个 Warp / Block，足够做 Warp 级并行

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Shared Memory 利用率好

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:11.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: ← 最常用

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Occupancy 通常不错

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: └ 适用于大多数 kernel

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: blockSize 较大 (512-1024)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 16-32 个 Warp / Block

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每 Block 可用 Shared Memory 更多 (因为 Block 数少)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: __syncthreads() 开销增加 (要同步更多 Warp)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 寄存器压力大: 每线程可用寄存器减少

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 可能只有 1-2 个 Block / SM → 灵活性差

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: └ 适用于: 需要大量线程间协作的 kernel (如大 reduce)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: blockSize 的选择涉及多个因素的权衡:
